name: z/d wet dog food
description: food sensitivities and intolerance are potentially serious problems that can result in irritated skin, coat and ear conditions or even gastrointestinal upset. dogs that have adverse food reactions due to a food allergy (typically to a protein in the food) or intolerance, benefit from a food designed for food sensitivities. highly hydrolyzed animal protein & single carbohydrate source added natural fiber clinically proven antioxidants formulated without additives known to cause food allergies
